scenario.name: ctrl_b3_01_ptz
scenario.send:
MESSAGE sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000002000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagB301[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] MESSAGE Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-B301 Content-Type: Application/MANSCDP+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <Control> <CmdType>DeviceControl</CmdType> <SN>1</SN> <DeviceID>34020000001320000001</DeviceID> <PTZControl> <PanTiltSpeed>5</PanTiltSpeed> <ZoomSpeed>5</ZoomSpeed> <ControlCommand>00 08</ControlCommand> </PTZControl> </Control>
